---
title: "Psychometric results"
format: html
---

```{r}
source("R/data_setup.R")
```

## Basic {#basic}

#### Cronbach alpha by `quest`

```{r}
if (all(is.na(alpha_by_quest$alpha))) {
  cat("Package `psych` is not available in this environment, so alpha estimates are shown as NA.")
}

if (requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
  DT::datatable(
    alpha_by_quest %>% select(-domain_code),
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip")
  )
} else {
  knitr::kable(alpha_by_quest %>% select(-domain_code), caption = "Install package `DT` for table display")
}
```
*Note. `gm` = gross motor, `fm` = fine motor, `cg` = problem-solving, `ps` = personal-social, and `c` = communication.*

#### Alpha trend across questionnaires

```{r}
alpha_plot_data <- alpha_by_quest %>% filter(!is.na(alpha))

if (nrow(alpha_plot_data) == 0) {
  cat("No alpha values available to plot.")
} else {
  ggplot(alpha_plot_data, aes(x = quest, y = alpha, color = domain)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(alpha_plot_data$quest))) +
    labs(x = "Questionnaire month (quest)", y = "Cronbach alpha", color = "Domain") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}
```

## CFA {#cfa}

#### CFA fit indices (cached results)

```{r}
if (!cfa_available || nrow(cfa_fit_by_quest) == 0) {
  cat("No cached CFA fit results were found in the loaded data.")
} else if (requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
  DT::datatable(
    cfa_fit_by_quest,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip")
  )
} else {
  knitr::kable(cfa_fit_by_quest, caption = "Install package `DT` for table display")
}
```

#### Standardized factor loadings (cached results)

```{r}
if (!cfa_available || nrow(cfa_loadings) == 0) {
  cat("No cached CFA loadings were found in the loaded data.")
} else if (requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
  DT::datatable(
    cfa_loadings,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip")
  )
} else {
  knitr::kable(head(cfa_loadings, 50), caption = "Install package `DT` for table display")
}
```
